description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Floating TV Stand, Wall Mounted TV Shelf with Led Lights & Power Outlet,Cabinet for White tv Stands for Living Room

Place of Origin:China

Main Color:White

Main Material:MDF

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):68.90

Assembled Width (in.):11.80

Assembled Height (in.):9.84

Product Weight (lbs.):46.86

Package Size

Length (in.):74.61

Width (in.):17.52

Height (in.):6.10

Weight (lbs.):57.86

Product Features

  • Equipped with 3 standard plugs and 2 USB ports, the floating TV stand provides convenient power charging for your TV, DVD, WiFi router and more
  • The floating TV cabinet has been upgraded to a touch-sensitive LED light strip, and the groove above the cabinet can be embedded with the light strip to create a unique atmosphere.
  • TV stand with large storage and open shelves can be used to store game consoles, media, magazines, daily necessities, remote controls and decorative ornaments.
  • Simple style, it can add practicality and decoration to your home.
  • This TV stand comes with tools and easy-to-follow instructions for assembly. If you have any questions about our products, we are happy to provide you with timely service support to solve any problems for you.
